name: sapkit
description: Harness-portable lite edition of SuperClaude for SAP — 15 module knowledge packs (14 + BC), 14 industries, 16 countries, ABAP conventions/templates, 26 consultant/role personas (on-demand via INDEX selector), 19 procedures (14 exposed as skills) with human approval + fresh-context review gates, and the ABAP ADT MCP server (155 tools inspection-only / 186 connected). Quality model is one worker + one fresh-context reviewer + SAP machine verification (CheckSyntax → Activate → ABAP Unit → ATC); implementation may be delegated to a single fresh worker under the development-loop policy, but review always stays independent.
